title: UNIQUE constraint support is now in Public Preview
body: Databricks SQL now supports informational `UNIQUE` constraints on Unity Catalog Delta Lake tables. Foreign keys can reference `UNIQUE` columns, and `RELY` on a `UNIQUE` constraint enables join elimination and `DISTINCT` simplification on Photon-enabled compute. See [CONSTRAINT clause](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/sql-ref-syntax-ddl-create-table-constraint).
